tactical_shape: Dominated possession but were blunt in attack
Pressed hard enough to force Curaçao back, but left space wide
standout_players: Enner Valencia — should have scored early but wasted the best chance to win it
Moisés Caicedo — had a shot saved by Room
Willian Pacho — had efforts saved and went close
Piero Hincapié — headed over from a corner
home_read.momentum: Another performance to forget; despite 27 shots they could not score and now must beat Germany to keep qualification hopes alive.

tactical_shape: Recovered into a disciplined, deep defensive shape after early pressure
Found space down the flanks when Ecuador’s wingbacks pushed high
standout_players: Eloy Room — heroic performance, made a World Cup-record number of stops in 90 minutes, including an early save on Valencia
Tahith Chong — driving run lifted the tempo
Leandro Bacuna — involved in a dangerous break after a brilliant back-heel from his brother
Hernán Galíndez — had to make a triple save from Curaçao pressure
Livano Comenencia — part of the attack that forced Galíndez into action
Jürgen Locadia — part of the attack that forced Galíndez into action
away_read.momentum: Historic first World Cup point, with a spirited response after the heavy defeat to Germany and a performance that showed they are not here to make up the numbers.
